posts.title: Freedom
posts.excerpt: Freedom in the Tantric grain is not choice but recognition — the universe manifesting itself spontaneously through consciousness and its own energy.

posts.title: Enjoyment
posts.excerpt: The two paths of the Trika — liberation and enjoyment — and how they fold into one another, through sacred sensory experience.

posts.title: Liberation
posts.excerpt: Against the mystic's flight from the body: liberation found through immersion in mind and flesh rather than escape from them.
